loan_contract_no.text: เลขสัญญาเงินกู้

combo.loan_contract_no_combo: select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no as item_code ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no as item_desc from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = 'สฐ' order by begining_of_contract desc

root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'sd Month yyyy') as requestm ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date,'Month') as start_keep_date_thai ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date,'yyyy') as start_keep_date_thai_year ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as memname ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_long( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as position ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code
--ที่อยู่ทะเบียนบ้าน ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 6 ) as address_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 8 ) as moo ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 7 ) as mooban ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 10 ) as soi ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 9 ) as road ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 11 ) as tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 12 ) as district ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 13 ) as province ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 14 ) as postcode ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 15 ) as telephone
,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount)::double precision) as loan_request_amount_thai ,(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_intrate(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type)*100)as int_rate ,sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai((sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount)::text) as period_payment_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai((sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount)::text) as loan_installment_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_contract.last_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai((sc_lon_m_contract.last_payment_amount)::text) as last_payment_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'sd Month yyyy') as begining_of_contract_date
,(select marriage_status from sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status where sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status) as marriage_status ,fpa_com_marriage(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as spname ,(select id_card from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as sp_id_card ,to_char(current_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY-HH24:MI:SS')||'-'||sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer as entry_id ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code ) as group_district ,( select sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_province where sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code ) as province_addr
--บันทึกข้อความ ,(select share_stock from sc_mem_m_share_mem where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as share_stock ,(select sum(principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as principal_balance ,(select sum(req_amount) from sc_lon_m_req_coll where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no) as req_amount ,(select si_security_user.user_name from si_security_user where user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer) as entry_name
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info
where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ส6800799' order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no asc

r_tnma_contract_by_conno_norm_05_nest.sql: select cname , ref_own_no , seq_no from ( select (CASE collateral_type_code WHEN '02' THEN 'หุ้นค้ำประกัน' ELSE collateral_description END) as cname ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,row_number() over () AS seq_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_contract where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in( '01','12','13') and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' /*WHERE*/ order by collateral_no ) tab_coll

r_tnma_contract_by_conno_norm_oth_nest.sql: select ref_own_no ,(case when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '02' then sc_lon_m_ucf_collateral_type.collateral_description when sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '03' then sc_lon_m_ucf_collateral_type.collateral_description else sc_lon_m_ucf_collateral_type.collateral_description || ' ' || sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description end ) as cname from sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_ucf_collateral_type where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_collateral_type.collateral_type_code and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code not in( '01','12','13') and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = (select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no from sc_lon_m_contract where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'สอ6800032' ) order by sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no
